args.content:
{
  "fields": {
    "company_name": "Veridyne Networks, Inc.",
    "ticker_symbol": "VRDN",
    "fiscal_period": "Q3 FY2026",
    "fiscal_period_end_date": "2026-02-28",
    "total_revenue_usd_millions": 187.4,
    "revenue_yoy_growth_pct": 38,
    "subscription_revenue_usd_millions": 171.2,
    "gaap_gross_margin_pct": 76.3,
    "non_gaap_operating_income_usd_millions": 9.8,
    "total_customers": 4117,
    "customers_above_100k_arr": 1082,
    "customers_above_1m_arr": 71,
    "net_dollar_retention_pct": 124,
    "total_arr_usd_millions": 710,
    "fte_count_end_of_q3": 1847,
    "stitchwise_acquisition_total_consideration_usd_millions": 115,
    "stitchwise_close_date": "2026-01-22",
    "fy2026_revenue_guidance_low_usd_millions": 722,
    "fy2026_revenue_guidance_high_usd_millions": 726,
    "share_repurchase_authorization_usd_millions": 200
  },
  "uncertain": [],
  "notes": "All 20 fields were found in the press release. Key extraction notes: (1) total_arr_usd_millions: press release states 'exceeded $710 million' — extracted 710 as the stated figure per schema guidance. (2) stitchwise_acquisition_total_consideration_usd_millions: press release states 'approximately $115 million' — extracted 115 as the stated figure. (3) revenue_yoy_growth_pct: stated as '38%' — extracted as integer 38. (4) net_dollar_retention_pct: stated as '124%' — extracted as 124. (5) non_gaap_operating_income_usd_millions: stated as '$9.8 million' (positive income, not loss) — extracted as 9.8."
}

args.command: python3 -c "import json; data = json.load(open('/workspace/extraction_results.json')); print(f'Fields count: {len(data[\"fields\"])}'); print(f'Uncertain: {data[\"uncertain\"]}'); [print(f'  {k}: {v} (type={type(v).__name__})') for k,v in data['fields'].items()]"

args.summary: Extracted all 20 fields from the Veridyne Networks Q3 FY2026 press release into /workspace/extraction_results.json. All fields validated against the schema for correct types (string, integer, number, date) and units (USD millions, percent). No uncertain fields — every value was explicitly stated in the document. Key decisions documented in notes: ARR extracted as 710 (stated "exceeded $710M"), Stitchwise consideration as 115 (stated "approximately $115M"), and non-GAAP operating income as positive 9.8 (not loss).
